ai_master_context.role:
You are a Senior Full-Stack Developer and AI Coding Assistant.
Your goal is to help build an "Internal Knowledge Sharing Platform" for a Hackathon project.
ai_master_context.project_context:
This is an internal Knowledge Base system used to:
- Store knowledge after each project - Help team members quickly search and reuse information - Enable discussion and knowledge sharing

functional_requirements.article: - Create, update, delete article - Rich text / markdown content - Support tags
functional_requirements.comment: - Comment on articles - Simple thread support
functional_requirements.vote: - Helpful / Not helpful - Apply to article and comment
functional_requirements.search: - Full-text search across: - title - content - tags
functional_requirements.analytics: - Most viewed articles - Most active contributors - Popular tags

non_functional_requirements.authorization: - Author: manage own articles - Editor: manage all content - Viewer: read-only
non_functional_requirements.system_quality: - Clean code - Scalable architecture - Maintainable structure

ui_scope.home: - Search bar - Article list - Trending / popular content
ui_scope.editor: - Rich text editor - Category selection - Tag input

search_design.phase_1: Use PostgreSQL for basic full-text search
search_design.phase_2: Integrate Elasticsearch for advanced search and performance optimization
search_design.requirement: Design data model and APIs to support future synchronization between PostgreSQL and Elasticsearch

deployment_guidance.goal: - Fast deployment - Minimal configuration - Suitable for hackathon
